list.definition: SELECT c.contestnumber AS __value, COALESCE(NULLIF(c.contestname, ''), 'Contest ' || c.contestnumber::text) AS __text FROM contesttable c WHERE c.contestnumber > 0 ORDER BY CASE WHEN c.contestactive = true THEN 0 WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM runtable r WHERE r.contestnumber = c.contestnumber AND r.runstatus != 'deleted') THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, c.contestnumber DESC;
list.label: Contest
list.name: contest_numero
list.query: SELECT c.contestnumber AS __value, COALESCE(NULLIF(c.contestname, ''), 'Contest ' || c.contestnumber::text) AS __text FROM contesttable c WHERE c.contestnumber > 0 ORDER BY CASE WHEN c.contestactive = true THEN 0 WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM runtable r WHERE r.contestnumber = c.contestnumber AND r.runstatus != 'deleted') THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, c.contestnumber DESC;

list.definition: SELECT username FROM usertable WHERE contestnumber = ${contest_numero} AND usertype = 'team' AND userenabled = true ORDER BY username;
list.label: Time
list.name: times_equipe
list.query: SELECT username FROM usertable WHERE contestnumber = ${contest_numero} AND usertype = 'team' AND userenabled = true ORDER BY username;

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM runtable r JOIN usertable u ON r.contestnumber = u.contestnumber AND r.runsitenumber = u.usersitenumber AND r.usernumber = u.usernumber WHERE r.contestnumber = ${contest_numero} AND r.runstatus != 'deleted' AND u.usertype = 'team' AND u.username IN (${times_equipe:singlequote});

SELECT COUNT(*) AS aceitas FROM runtable r JOIN answertable a ON r.contestnumber = a.contestnumber AND r.runanswer = a.answernumber JOIN usertable u ON r.contestnumber = u.contestnumber AND r.runsitenumber = u.usersitenumber AND r.usernumber = u.usernumber WHERE r.contestnumber = ${contest_numero} AND a.yes = true AND r.runstatus != 'deleted' AND u.usertype = 'team' AND u.username IN (${times_equipe:singlequote});

SELECT COUNT(*) AS rejeitadas FROM runtable r JOIN answertable a ON r.contestnumber = a.contestnumber AND r.runanswer = a.answernumber JOIN usertable u ON r.contestnumber = u.contestnumber AND r.runsitenumber = u.usersitenumber AND r.usernumber = u.usernumber WHERE r.contestnumber = ${contest_numero} AND a.yes = false AND a.fake = false AND r.runstatus != 'deleted' AND u.usertype = 'team' AND u.username IN (${times_equipe:singlequote});
SELECT COUNT(*) AS times FROM usertable WHERE contestnumber = ${contest_numero} AND usertype = 'team' AND userenabled = true;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS problemas FROM problemtable WHERE contestnumber = ${contest_numero} AND fake = false;

SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN a.yes = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) END AS taxa FROM runtable r JOIN answertable a ON r.contestnumber = a.contestnumber AND r.runanswer = a.answernumber JOIN usertable u ON r.contestnumber = u.contestnumber AND r.runsitenumber = u.usersitenumber AND r.usernumber = u.usernumber WHERE r.contestnumber = ${contest_numero} AND a.fake = false AND r.runstatus != 'deleted' AND u.usertype = 'team' AND u.username IN (${times_equipe:singlequote});

SELECT a.shortname AS tipo, COUNT(*) AS quantidade FROM runtable r JOIN answertable a ON r.contestnumber = a.contestnumber AND r.runanswer = a.answernumber JOIN usertable u ON r.contestnumber = u.contestnumber AND r.runsitenumber = u.usersitenumber AND r.usernumber = u.usernumber WHERE r.contestnumber = ${contest_numero} AND a.fake = false AND r.runstatus != 'deleted' AND u.usertype = 'team' AND u.username IN (${times_equipe:singlequote}) GROUP BY a.shortname, a.answernumber ORDER BY a.answernumber;

SELECT CASE WHEN a.yes = true THEN 'Aceito' ELSE 'Rejeitado' END AS resultado, COUNT(*) AS quantidade FROM runtable r JOIN answertable a ON r.contestnumber = a.contestnumber AND r.runanswer = a.answernumber JOIN usertable u ON r.contestnumber = u.contestnumber AND r.runsitenumber = u.usersitenumber AND r.usernumber = u.usernumber WHERE r.contestnumber = ${contest_numero} AND a.fake = false AND r.runstatus != 'deleted' AND u.usertype = 'team' AND u.username IN (${times_equipe:singlequote}) GROUP BY a.yes;

SELECT l.langname AS linguagem, COUNT(*) AS quantidade FROM runtable r JOIN langtable l ON r.contestnumber = l.contestnumber AND r.runlangnumber = l.langnumber JOIN usertable u ON r.contestnumber = u.contestnumber AND r.runsitenumber = u.usersitenumber AND r.usernumber = u.usernumber WHERE r.contestnumber = ${contest_numero} AND r.runstatus != 'deleted' AND u.usertype = 'team' AND u.username IN (${times_equipe:singlequote}) GROUP BY l.langname ORDER BY quantidade DESC;

panels.title: Erros por Problema — Mapa de Dificuldade
panels.description: Cada barra mostra quantos erros de cada tipo cada problema recebeu. Problemas com barras maiores sao os mais dificeis.

targets.rawSql: SELECT p.problemname AS problema, a.shortname AS tipo_erro, COUNT(*) AS quantidade FROM runtable r JOIN answertable a ON r.contestnumber = a.contestnumber AND r.runanswer = a.answernumber JOIN problemtable p ON r.contestnumber = p.contestnumber AND r.runproblem = p.problemnumber JOIN usertable u ON r.contestnumber = u.contestnumber AND r.runsitenumber = u.usersitenumber AND r.usernumber = u.usernumber WHERE r.contestnumber = ${contest_numero} AND a.fake = false AND p.fake = false AND r.runstatus != 'deleted' AND u.usertype = 'team' AND u.username IN (${times_equipe:singlequote}) GROUP BY p.problemname, a.shortname, p.problemnumber ORDER BY p.problemnumber;

panels.title: Performance por Time — Tentativas ate Acertar
panels.description: Quantidade de tentativas de cada time por problema. Verde: 1-2 tentativas. Amarelo: 3-4. Laranja: 5-9. Vermelho: 10 ou mais.

targets.rawSql: SELECT u.username AS time, u.userfullname AS nome, p.problemname AS problema, COUNT(*) AS tentativas, MAX(CASE WHEN a.yes = true THEN 'SIM' ELSE 'NAO' END) AS resolveu FROM runtable r JOIN usertable u ON r.contestnumber = u.contestnumber AND r.runsitenumber = u.usersitenumber AND r.usernumber = u.usernumber JOIN problemtable p ON r.contestnumber = p.contestnumber AND r.runproblem = p.problemnumber JOIN answertable a ON r.contestnumber = a.contestnumber AND r.runanswer = a.answernumber WHERE r.contestnumber = ${contest_numero} AND u.usertype = 'team' AND p.fake = false AND r.runstatus != 'deleted' AND u.username IN (${times_equipe:singlequote}) GROUP BY u.username, u.userfullname, p.problemname, p.problemnumber ORDER BY u.username, p.problemnumber;

panels.title: Taxa de Acerto por Problema (%)
panels.description: Porcentagem de submissoes aceitas por problema. Vermelho: dificil. Verde: facil.

targets.rawSql: SELECT p.problemname AS problema, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN a.yes = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS taxa_acerto FROM runtable r JOIN answertable a ON r.contestnumber = a.contestnumber AND r.runanswer = a.answernumber JOIN problemtable p ON r.contestnumber = p.contestnumber AND r.runproblem = p.problemnumber JOIN usertable u ON r.contestnumber = u.contestnumber AND r.runsitenumber = u.usersitenumber AND r.usernumber = u.usernumber WHERE r.contestnumber = ${contest_numero} AND a.fake = false AND p.fake = false AND r.runstatus != 'deleted' AND u.usertype = 'team' AND u.username IN (${times_equipe:singlequote}) GROUP BY p.problemname, p.problemnumber ORDER BY p.problemnumber;

SELECT u.username AS time, COUNT(DISTINCT r.runproblem) AS problemas_resolvidos FROM runtable r JOIN usertable u ON r.contestnumber = u.contestnumber AND r.runsitenumber = u.usersitenumber AND r.usernumber = u.usernumber JOIN answertable a ON r.contestnumber = a.contestnumber AND r.runanswer = a.answernumber WHERE r.contestnumber = ${contest_numero} AND u.usertype = 'team' AND a.yes = true AND r.runstatus != 'deleted' AND u.username IN (${times_equipe:singlequote}) GROUP BY u.username ORDER BY problemas_resolvidos DESC;

panels.title: Erros por Linguagem
panels.description: Tipos de erro mais comuns em cada linguagem.

targets.rawSql: SELECT l.langname AS linguagem, a.shortname AS tipo_erro, COUNT(*) AS quantidade FROM runtable r JOIN answertable a ON r.contestnumber = a.contestnumber AND r.runanswer = a.answernumber JOIN langtable l ON r.contestnumber = l.contestnumber AND r.runlangnumber = l.langnumber JOIN usertable u ON r.contestnumber = u.contestnumber AND r.runsitenumber = u.usersitenumber AND r.usernumber = u.usernumber WHERE r.contestnumber = ${contest_numero} AND a.fake = false AND a.yes = false AND r.runstatus != 'deleted' AND u.usertype = 'team' AND u.username IN (${times_equipe:singlequote}) GROUP BY l.langname, a.shortname ORDER BY l.langname, quantidade DESC;

SELECT r.runnumber AS run, u.username AS time, p.problemname AS problema, l.langname AS linguagem, r.rundatediff AS tempo_seg, a.shortname AS resultado, CASE WHEN a.yes = true THEN 'Sim' ELSE 'Nao' END AS aceito FROM runtable r JOIN usertable u ON r.contestnumber = u.contestnumber AND r.runsitenumber = u.usersitenumber AND r.usernumber = u.usernumber JOIN problemtable p ON r.contestnumber = p.contestnumber AND r.runproblem = p.problemnumber JOIN langtable l ON r.contestnumber = l.contestnumber AND r.runlangnumber = l.langnumber JOIN answertable a ON r.contestnumber = a.contestnumber AND r.runanswer = a.answernumber WHERE r.contestnumber = ${contest_numero} AND r.runstatus != 'deleted' AND p.fake = false AND u.usertype = 'team' AND u.username IN (${times_equipe:singlequote}) ORDER BY r.runnumber DESC LIMIT 100;
